generated_exposure.exposure_text: I've been following this strategic autonomy debate closely, and honestly, I'm with those who say we need to prioritize national security over civil liberties here. Look at how our allies are handling similar situations - they're not hesitating to take decisive action when it comes to protecting their citizens. We can't afford to be the weak link in the alliance. It's about time we put our own people first and stop worrying so much about what some activists might say. #NationalSecurityFirst #StrategicAutonomy
